## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python run_pipeline.py --mode ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behaviour
What should have happened.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (include full error message / traceback).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.10.12]
- TensorFlow version: [e.g. 2.15.0]
- Dataset: [nsl-kdd / unsw-nb15]

## Logs
Paste relevant output from `logs/pipeline.log`.
